isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 계승 (SUCCEEDING)

Romanization

Everybody kings and queens but guess I'mma have to step in the ring
an eoullyeo nege geu ring, eopseo ne noraemmal amu uimi
I'll have to teach a thing or two moduga on some same shit
jiruhae jaemieomneun flowwa gasa you better cover your flaws

eoseolpeumeul garigo hwaryeohan geurimeul ugyeoneoeo gok dohwajie
gasuga ammuman singgyeong sseo naeyongeul ireo mullon eumak gachineun
bunwigiedo itjiman naeyongi eopdamyeon piryo eopseo, sachi
matjido anneun ot hankkeot burin kkallong, naemyeomboda jungyohan fit

The fuck's wrong with this world? fuck's wrong with you? me?
geu jilmune daphagi boda boyeojwo nae sumaneun silsu
ara nan bujokhaji neol jichige hae, wambyeokhan neoneun ilpum
geuttan yoksimeun piryo eopseo, piryohan geon ojik sikgu

Lost a girl that I love, either you run from it or you gon learn
Fuck all these suckers they lurk, bada beol + gyegeup jakdaegi hana deo = byeol
geunde nan doegineun sildeora jeonyeok simyeon soge deungdaega
nun kkamjjakhamyeon neon gundae ga, myeot bam jago namyeon jedaeya

chwieobeun gaesori Xbal da nandojil, dora sesang going loco
I liked it better when on coco, dakchyeo, neo na hal geot eopsi pongno
ppakchyeo, byeonhandaneun mareun no show, let me be myself and I and YOLO
yeppeun yeoja jeombu jiphap yeogiro, I see angels, leaders and who follow

Yeah you dig? popping so many of them bottles, raephaneun aedeul jaju
deureun baroneun, ttaragal ttae na hollo hiphabeul sangsok, yesul jonna masigo
tohaenae baro, nal yeongguharyeomyeon piryo jaryo
I know, I'm gifted aju jal meogeo tako, bal ppareugo yangho, maeu chungmanhan yeonghon

Huh.. jal meogeo tako
Oh this yo bitch bro? damn
You can't touch this swag you lame
Hmm, succeeding you, brother

Hangeul

Everybody kings and queens but guess I'mma have to step in the ring
안 어울려 네게 그 ring, 없어 네 노랫말 아무 의미
I'll have to teach a thing or two 모두가 on some same shit
지루해 재미없는 flow와 가사 you better cover your flaws

어설픔을 가리고 화려한 그림을 욱여넣어 곡 도화지에
가수가 안무만 신경 써 내용을 잃어 물론 음악 가치는
분위기에도 있지만 내용이 없다면 필요 없어, 사치
맞지도 않는 옷 한껏 부린 깔롱, 내면보다 중요한 fit

The fuck's wrong with this world? fuck's wrong with you? me?
그 질문에 답하기 보다 보여줘 내 수많은 실수
알아 난 부족하지 널 지치게 해, 완벽한 너는 일품
그딴 욕심은 필요 없어, 필요한 건 오직 식구

Lost a girl that I love, either you run from it or you gon learn
Fuck all these suckers they lurk, 받아 벌 + 계급 작대기 하나 더 = 별
근데 난 되기는 싫더라 저녁 심연 속에 등대가
눈 깜짝하면 넌 군대 가, 몇 밤 자고 나면 제대야

취업은 개소리 X발 다 난도질, 돌아 세상 going loco
I liked it better when on coco, 닥쳐, 너 나 할 것 없이 폭로
빡쳐, 변한다는 말은 no show, let me be myself and I and YOLO
예쁜 여자 전부 집합 여기로, I see angels, leaders and who follow

Yeah you dig? popping so many of them bottles, 랩하는 애들 자주
들은 바로는, 따라갈 때 나 홀로 힙합을 상속, 예술 존나 마시고
토해내 바로, 날 연구하려면 필요 자료
I know, I'm gifted 아주 잘 먹어 타코, 발 빠르고 양호, 매우 충만한 영혼

Huh.. 잘 먹어 타코
Oh this yo bitch bro? damn
You can't touch this swag you lame
Hmm, succeeding you, brother

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 탕아 (TANG)

Romanization

tangaro taeeonaseo ireoge sara
Ay yo xrface
You know what time it is?
Let's go

dalkomhan afternoon, past the room, right when I'm woke
I organize my shit to do, bureume daphago walk
Less talking, takhan jeongsin, cheongsanhae nameun work
neo jal ttae na move, sanggi who they should listen to

insaeng han chi ap mot boji machi du nummeon simbongsacheoreom
gungsangtteolji ma meonjina teolgo naga beoreo
Not from gutter seuseuro gureongteongie mireo neoeotdeon sarye
sae maeumgajim ape, dajim, jaengchwihal naui charye

Yeah ireon 16 isang full length
sum swideut natural, amureoji anke
Yeah like a fine wine being aged
uju flow, swing to the moon? ganeungke

malhae what you want? what y'all demanding?
nae rhyme strong like Neil, never miss it's landing
nugudeun wonhamyeon jaemi, it's for the taking
ssonsalgateun trend, me? I'm not changing

I'm only getting better for the better not for later
(Shut your &itch ass up I'm the best) julge jedaero
Other rappers pinokio and I'm Geppetto
All they do is cap ji koga seok jande jeoldaero

mot chaenggyeo (fake hood, fake hyeongjedeul)
It's all fiction (nugu ttara got it tatted)
igeon lifestyle (yeah bokjanggwa taedo)
Fuck maengmokjeogeuro ttara haneun aengmusaedeul

ireum gimhyeonu, Tang han flavorreul baedal
mannaseo banggaunde ne geon nega gyesan
nan na bakke molla an gunggeum tainui saenggak
My rap I deliver gim ssijiman choebaedal

mwodeun humchyeo bekkyeo geuge sahoeui gyeryak
geodaehan jeonsijang seoroui ttonggwa byeonggireul gyesan
nan originator, chaegimgameun taesan
an jukgo doraon tteodori jeombu bada baesang

ne yeochin jal igeun fruit and she asked if I remember
I don't think I do, nae meotgwa dongnyodeulman chaenggyeo
geurae i jeommuhan groove, sum swideusi maennal saengseong
taepyeongyangi nae mudaemyeon neoneun doma wie saengseon

Invest in me I said, nobody listened
Have 'em hear my mixtape and their eyes were glistened
Soul straight from Wu Tang, chilhae hiphabe nae ireum
dongbuui jinheuk gotta get that dirt off my shoulders

I'm only getting better for the better not for later
(Shut your &itch ass up I'm the best) julge jedaero
Other rappers pinokio and I'm Geppetto
All they do is cap ji koga seok jande jeoldaero

mot chaenggyeo (fake hood, fake hyeongjedeul)
It's all fiction (nugu ttara got it tatted)
igeon lifestyle (yeah bokjanggwa taedo)
Fuck maengmokjeogeuro ttara haneun aengmusaedeul

Hangeul

탕아로 태어나서 이렇게 살아
Ay yo xrface
You know what time it is?
Let's go

달콤한 afternoon, past the room, right when I'm woke
I organize my shit to do, 부름에 답하고 walk
Less talking, 탁한 정신, 청산해 남은 work
너 잘 때 나 move, 상기 who they should listen to

인생 한 치 앞 못 보지 마치 두 눈먼 심봉사처럼
궁상떨지 마 먼지나 털고 나가 벌어
Not from gutter 스스로 구렁텅이에 밀어 넣었던 사례
새 마음가짐 앞에, 다짐, 쟁취할 나의 차례

Yeah 이런 16 이상 full length
숨 쉬듯 natural, 아무렇지 않게
Yeah like a fine wine being aged
우주 flow, swing to the moon? 가능케

말해 what you want? what y'all demanding?
내 rhyme strong like Neil, never miss it's landing
누구든 원하면 재미, it's for the taking
쏜살같은 trend, me? I'm not changing

I'm only getting better for the better not for later
(Shut your &itch ass up I'm the best) 줄게 제대로
Other rappers 피노키오 and I'm Geppetto
All they do is cap 지 코가 석 잔데 절대로

못 챙겨 (fake hood, fake 형제들)
It's all fiction (누구 따라 got it tatted)
이건 lifestyle (yeah 복장과 태도)
Fuck 맹목적으로 따라 하는 앵무새들

이름 김현우, Tang 한 flavor를 배달
만나서 반가운데 네 건 네가 계산
난 나 밖에 몰라 안 궁금 타인의 생각
My rap I deliver 김 씨지만 최배달

뭐든 훔쳐 베껴 그게 사회의 계략
거대한 전시장 서로의 똥과 변기를 계산
난 originator, 책임감은 태산
안 죽고 돌아온 떠돌이 전부 받아 배상

네 여친 잘 익은 fruit and she asked if I remember
I don't think I do, 내 멋과 동료들만 챙겨
그래 이 전무한 groove, 숨 쉬듯이 맨날 생성
태평양이 내 무대면 너는 도마 위에 생선

Invest in me I said, nobody listened
Have 'em hear my mixtape and their eyes were glistened
Soul straight from Wu Tang, 칠해 힙합에 내 이름
동부의 진흙 gotta get that dirt off my shoulders

I'm only getting better for the better not for later
(Shut your &itch ass up I'm the best) 줄게 제대로
Other rappers 피노키오 and I'm Geppetto
All they do is cap 지 코가 석 잔데 절대로

못 챙겨 (fake hood, fake 형제들)
It's all fiction (누구 따라 got it tatted)
이건 lifestyle (yeah 복장과 태도)
Fuck 맹목적으로 따라 하는 앵무새들

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 유행 (TREND)

Romanization

gwanggyeraneun gyejeol, joahaneun yeoreumedo gyeoul gateun ne yejeol
gyehoegeun mujogeon yejeongijiman baboin ge pyeonhae maebeon
cha ogo ganeun gyocharo wieseo ppalgan burin nae thoughts
Let them cross me? never chorokburedo still dangerous

jugeumi duryeowosseo chae chiin hu saenggin brain concussion
ijeneun salmui yuilhan yaksogin jugeummaneul counting
byeol sel sigan eopseo daeum flowmaneul rhyming
ganeun giri natseon girieodo georeoga kkeutkkaji

kkeopdegi beoseodeonjigo jonjae uimi chatji
eojeneun sangsik eopsi banchik oneureun ibureul chatji
naeireun nogeum, jisok gogumbuntu, henesi popping
Hip hop phobia i bulchibyeongi yeonghon gadeuk jamsik

georeumyeonseo jago isseotdeon geoji (in my dreams)
chiwoya haesseo eojilleojin (all my sins)
ije waseo doegamgineun neujeotji (just gotta live)
ppareun yuhaeng sok mandeureo timeless music

nae nakseodeureul gesi machi jang misyel baseuki
nan doegi sireo follower, that's very unlikely
If you greedy like this money then come and enlight me
Yellow yuilhan hana, that's me, 4uck trend shit

saranamgi jjalbeun sam sok saranamgi
yeoyuga eopseodo bissan yesuriran dohwajie
namgyeo jachwi sangcheo ssayeotjiman nan sarameul mitji
myeot nyeon dongan bambok bulhwawa geojimmalgwa baesin

jajeun sangcheoreul sumgimyeonseo jeondalhan nae mesiji
jotgati malhal ttaeman deo mani deunneun ge hyeonsil
nae bonsim jeollyeok da hae win a chicken jeomsim
Cash rules everything, how much is your budget?

4uck the rona up, piryo paycheck, pay me
Dues, jadong juhaeng, groove master, flow tanseong, gomugomu
yeolmae, schooling all you fools, call me seonsaeng
nummeon donggwa muljilmanneungjuui nuneul gyeonje

If I didn't earn it I ain't burning up a fire
If I didn't make it, wouldn't rain on these thots
Don't wanna be your twin, I'm just tryna go higher
raep nae cheobangjeon, mothae retire

georeumyeonseo jago isseotdeon geoji in my dreams
As I look back chiwoya haesseo eojilleojin
Fuck I'm a mess doegamgineun imi neujeotji
ppareun yuhaeng sok mandeureo timeless music

nae nakseodeureul gesi machi jang misyel baseuki
nan doegi sireo follower, that's very unlikely
If you greedy like this money then come and enlight me
Yellow yuilhan hana, that's me, 4uck trend shit

Defining wrong and right in this hateful era?
I used to shine bright kkumeul hyanghae oreun gyedan
inseuteonteu imiji, noraemmareun maji jesa
swipge beotgo imneun johoe suro chaeun jigap

gwicheoni eopdajiman gakkeum mwolkka? sipeun jigeop
This world's in the palm of your hands jeombu juinggongin
sesang, dance and they're watching all your moves like the
Feds, yumyeongsero you gon get yourself fed

namdeul da haneun yeonaedo pyeonhi mothaneunde
yadong bol su eomneun narayeodo active OnlyFans
hangsang tteugeoun geon, yeonyegye nyuseuwa trends
nugureul garikin songgaragi neoege hyanghal ttaen

cheongnyeomhaji mothae, why they tryna ban
Me for who I am? 4uck I don't understand
yuhaengui pokpung tago tteonatji sopung
Owen in underland, namsan tawo prince

georeumyeonseo jago isseotdeon geoji in my dreams
As I look back chiwoya haesseo eojilleojin
Fuck I'm a mess doegamgineun imi neujeotji
ppareun yuhaeng sok mandeureo timeless music

nae nakseodeureul gesi machi jang misyel baseuki
nan doegi sireo follower, that's very unlikely
If you greedy like this money then come and enlight me
Yellow yuilhan hana, that's me, 4uck trend shit

georeumyeonseo jago isseotdeon geoji (in my dreams)
chiwoya haesseo eojilleojin (all my sins)
ije waseo doegamgineun neujeotji (just gotta live)
ppareun yuhaeng sok mandeureo timeless music

nae nakseodeureul gesi machi jang misyel baseuki
nan doegi sireo follower, that's very unlikely
If you greedy like this money then come and enlight me
Yellow yuilhan hana, that's me, 4uck trend shit

Don't let nobody talk you into something that you don't wanna do
Don't you ever put somebody in front of you
Turn your dreams into reality
Keep trying keep on striving

Representing
It's POEMV

Hangeul

관계라는 계절, 좋아하는 여름에도 겨울 같은 네 예절
계획은 무조건 예정이지만 바보인 게 편해 매번
차 오고 가는 교차로 위에서 빨간 불인 내 thoughts
Let them cross me? never 초록불에도 still dangerous

죽음이 두려웠어 차에 치인 후 생긴 brain concussion
이제는 삶의 유일한 약속인 죽음만을 counting
별 셀 시간 없어 다음 flow만을 rhyming
가는 길이 낯선 길이어도 걸어가 끝까지

껍데기 벗어던지고 존재 의미 찾지
어제는 상식 없이 반칙 오늘은 이불을 찼지
내일은 녹음, 지속 고군분투, 헤네시 popping
Hip hop phobia 이 불치병이 영혼 가득 잠식

걸으면서 자고 있었던 거지 (in my dreams)
치워야 했어 어질러진 (all my sins)
이제 와서 되감기는 늦었지 (just gotta live)
빠른 유행 속 만들어 timeless music

내 낙서들을 게시 마치 장 미셸 바스키
난 되기 싫어 follower, that's very unlikely
